final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a cross-border e-commerce promotional campaign, designed for advertising purposes, in a 16:9 landscape format.

Style/medium: bold graphic design poster, editorial commercial illustration style, layered typographic composition with decorative art lettering
Composition: 16:9 wide landscape layout, multi-layer depth with product/hero subject placed in the foreground intentionally overlapping and partially obscuring background typographic layers, dynamic visual hierarchy
Subject: a featured product (e.g. packaged goods or consumer electronics) as the hero element, positioned to block portions of the stacked letterforms behind it, creating a sense of dimensional depth
Scene/backdrop: rich promotional background with stacked oversized typography in multiple font weights and sizes forming a dense but organized typographic landscape — words layered atop each other at varying scales and opacities
Lighting/mood: vibrant and energetic promotional mood, bold contrast between subject and background type layers, festive commercial energy
Color palette: high-impact brand colors — deep saturated base (navy or dark red) contrasted with bright accent tones (gold, white, electric yellow) to separate typographic layers from the product
Materials/textures: glossy product surface reflecting light, semi-transparent overlapping letterforms with subtle texture variation to prevent visual clutter
Text (verbatim): decorative art lettering and stacked font typography integrated into the background design — multiple lines of promotional copy layered at different scales, partially hidden behind the product subject
Constraints: composition must feel complex and layered but visually organized — no chaotic clutter; typographic stacking must follow a clear visual rhythm; product must physically overlap at least two layers of background text; art lettering must be stylized and decorative, not plain body text
Avoid: plain flat single-layer layout, uniform font sizes, empty backgrounds, illegible chaos, clip-art product images, generic stock-photo aesthetic
